name: PAX 4 Raised Mouthpieces
summary: Enhance airflow and comfort with the PAX 4 Raised Mouthpiece Set.
description: Enhance airflow and comfort with the PAX 4 Raised Mouthpiece Set. Designed specifically for the PAX 4 Vaporiser, these official replacement mouthpieces feature an elevated design that allows for increased airflow and a smoother, more comfortable draw. The raised profile provides a slightly extended mouthpiece position, improving comfort during sessions while maintaining the clean flavour and consistent vapour quality PAX devices are known for. Ideal as replacement parts or additional accessories for everyday use. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
